Hydration failed because the server rendered HTML didn't match the client

This can happen if a SSR-ed Client Component used a server/client branch.

  • A server/client branch such as typeof window !== 'undefined'.
  • Variable input such as Date.now() or Math.random().
  • Date formatting in a user's locale which doesn't match the server.
  • Invalid HTML tag nesting.

How to fix

Use an effect for client-only differences or pass a stable snapshot.
